text:
G1IB_SUPP_TOLIET (G1IB) Toilet Use Support Provided CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: toilet use - ADL support provided. "-" = Unknown, 0 = No setup or physical help from staff, 1 = Setup help only, 2 = One person physical assist, 3 = Two+ person physical assist, 8 = ADL activity itself did not occur during entire 7 days
224 G1JA G1JA_SELF_HYGIENE (G1JA) Personal Hygiene Self Performance CHAR 1 Physical functioning and structural problems: personal hygiene - ADL
